title: grastidium dolichocaulon
intro: Grastidium dolichocaulon, also known as the tall grasswort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Restionaceae. It is native to Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of soothing respiratory problems and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Grastidium dolichocaulon include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
